top_signals.title: US Stocks Decline as Traders Await Warsh Comments, Fresh Data
top_signals.summary: US stocks declined before the opening bell on Wednesday as traders awaited unscripted commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh and fresh economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
top_signals.summary: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts
top_signals.summary: Bernstein reaffirms Outperform on Circle with a $190 target after OUSD's launch sent CRCL stock down over 17%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
